programme.title: Capturing Home
programme.desc: Their kids finally moved out, and a couple is ready to reclaim their home; they enlist Kate and Amy to help transform their dated family house into a functional, modern dwelling where they can entertain and relish their retirement.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Building Outside the Lines
programme.desc: Cappie and Alex create a one-of-a-kind escape by anchoring a sailboat into the South Dakota earth and crafting a three-sided dock for their landlocked boat-loving clients; it's a dry-docked dream with sunset views and zero waves.

programme.title: Building Outside the Lines
programme.sub-title: Historic Granary Becomes a Goat Milk Goods Haven
programme.desc: Cappie and Alex relocate and restore a 120-year-old granary, transforming it into a rustic-yet-functional retail space for goat milk-based products -- honoring their clients' expanding farm with personal touches and plenty of space to grow.

programme.title: Capturing Home
programme.desc: A couple needs help transforming their backyard patio and their dark, dated Tiki room into a bright, beautiful area to hang out.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Capturing Home
programme.desc: Their kids finally moved out, and a couple is ready to reclaim their home; they enlist Kate and Amy to help transform their dated family house into a functional, modern dwelling where they can entertain and relish their retirement.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Building Off the Grid
programme.desc: Bamboo-home architect David Sands seizes the opportunity to build his own getaway in Hawaii that features a luxurious outdoor bath area and detached, starlit master bedroom; however, volcanic eruptions threaten to send the entire project up in smoke.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Building Off the Grid
programme.desc: A family builds thousands of earth blocks while withstanding winter monsoons, freezing temperatures and more to finish their forever home in San Antonio, Texas.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Building Off the Grid
programme.desc: Marine scientists in Florida hire engineers Nicolas Derouin and Arnaud Luguet to create a first-of-its-kind floating home; they have nine months to complete it, but unpredictable weather and building hiccups may sink this project before it can swim.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Building Off the Grid
programme.desc: A couple plans to build an oceanfront oasis for their family in Maui, Hawaii and, to keep the budget low, they design a Quonset hut which can be built cheaply and quickly, but some setbacks test their limits at every turn.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Building Outside the Lines
programme.sub-title: Historic Granary Becomes a Goat Milk Goods Haven
programme.desc: Cappie and Alex relocate and restore a 120-year-old granary, transforming it into a rustic-yet-functional retail space for goat milk-based products -- honoring their clients' expanding farm with personal touches and plenty of space to grow.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Praveeni and Sashien love the finer things in life, especially the opulent look of high-end hotels, and are currently seeking a lakefront property that embodies their travel lifestyle.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Looking for harmony with Krystal and Josh, two music producers in search of a peaceful place to compose and raise their child; checking out an island retreat, a sleek, terraced beachside property and a timber-ceiling home with a unique wine feature.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Taking stock with recent retirees Irv and Sheryl, who want a well-appointed, grandkid-friendly hideaway; exploring a magnificent home with a gourmet kitchen, a peninsula property with killer views, and a modern custom build on multiple tiers of land.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: June and Patrick, along with their large and active blended family, are on the lookout for their dream lake house.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Dennis and Melanie hunt for a lake house that can serve as both their home and workspace; Melanie is looking for a space that can accommodate her dance business, while Dennis wants the perfect man cave.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Jordan and Aurelio search for a home that can accommodate their growing family in the future; they have a few big-ticket items on their wish list, including a gourmet kitchen, home office, dedicated children's room and a gym.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Looking for harmony with Krystal and Josh, two music producers in search of a peaceful place to compose and raise their child; checking out an island retreat, a sleek, terraced beachside property and a timber-ceiling home with a unique wine feature.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Taking stock with recent retirees Irv and Sheryl, who want a well-appointed, grandkid-friendly hideaway; exploring a magnificent home with a gourmet kitchen, a peninsula property with killer views, and a modern custom build on multiple tiers of land.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: June and Patrick, along with their large and active blended family, are on the lookout for their dream lake house.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Dennis and Melanie hunt for a lake house that can serve as both their home and workspace; Melanie is looking for a space that can accommodate her dance business, while Dennis wants the perfect man cave.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Jordan and Aurelio search for a home that can accommodate their growing family in the future; they have a few big-ticket items on their wish list, including a gourmet kitchen, home office, dedicated children's room and a gym.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Looking for harmony with Krystal and Josh, two music producers in search of a peaceful place to compose and raise their child; checking out an island retreat, a sleek, terraced beachside property and a timber-ceiling home with a unique wine feature.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Taking stock with recent retirees Irv and Sheryl, who want a well-appointed, grandkid-friendly hideaway; exploring a magnificent home with a gourmet kitchen, a peninsula property with killer views, and a modern custom build on multiple tiers of land.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: June and Patrick, along with their large and active blended family, are on the lookout for their dream lake house.

programme.title: Restored
programme.desc: The owners want to pass a landmark home along to their daughters but they want to bring back any Victorian style that has been lost, re-imagine the small kitchen and add modern conveniences; Brett needs to determine the original color scheme.

programme.title: Restored
programme.desc: The owner of the first house Brett tackled has purchased a Victorian home and needs help again; the project includes bringing back original exterior elements and colors as well as a complete restoration of the living room, mudroom and kitchen.

programme.title: Restored
programme.desc: Brett helps a woman and her adult children restore their majestic 1913 Mission Revival mansion; he's elated when he realizes he can restore the original linoleum in the kitchen, but the homeowners may not be open to the idea.

programme.title: Restored
programme.desc: Brett is called upon to restore a historically significant 1906 Arts and Crafts home; he brings it back to its original glory by reintroducing the closed-in fireplaces, reinstating the floor plan and replacing the 1980s kitchen.

programme.title: Restored
programme.desc: In Redlands, Calif., Brett restores a 1941 modern ranch for a couple who inherited the home; he modernizes the kitchen and opens up the living and dining room, then he surprises the couple by adding a feature found in the original blueprints.

programme.title: Restored
programme.desc: Brett's clients purchase their first home together, a 1923 Mediterranean Revival, and they want to restore it after years of small updates by the former homeowners; during demolition, Brett discovers the house is suffering from severe termite damage.

programme.title: Happy to Be Home
programme.sub-title: Happy to Help an Old Friend
programme.desc: Gray helps Grumpy's lifelong friend renovate a historic 1910 cottage; Gray worries that this friend, who brings as much grump to the project as Grumpy, will struggle to accept the color and whimsy she brings.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston
programme.desc: The Cordrays transform a 1922 filling station into a hot dog business for the island; honoring the building's past as a gas and tire station, as well as Michael's late father; they bring their signature design style to their first restaurant.

programme.title: Happy to Be Home
programme.sub-title: Happy to Help an Old Friend
programme.desc: Gray helps Grumpy's lifelong friend renovate a historic 1910 cottage; Gray worries that this friend, who brings as much grump to the project as Grumpy, will struggle to accept the color and whimsy she brings.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston
programme.desc: The Cordrays restore an early 20th century beach bungalow for an older couple who have deep roots in Galveston; they bring the original charm of the home that had been lost in the living room, dining room and bathroom spaces.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston
programme.desc: The Cordrays transform a 1922 filling station into a hot dog business for the island; honoring the building's past as a gas and tire station, as well as Michael's late father; they bring their signature design style to their first restaurant.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston
programme.desc: The Cordrays restore an early 20th century beach bungalow for an older couple who have deep roots in Galveston; they bring the original charm of the home that had been lost in the living room, dining room and bathroom spaces.

programme.title: Restored
programme.desc: The owners want to pass a landmark home along to their daughters but they want to bring back any Victorian style that has been lost, re-imagine the small kitchen and add modern conveniences; Brett needs to determine the original color scheme.

programme.title: Restored
programme.desc: The owner of the first house Brett tackled has purchased a Victorian home and needs help again; the project includes bringing back original exterior elements and colors as well as a complete restoration of the living room, mudroom and kitchen.

programme.title: Restored
programme.desc: Brett helps a woman and her adult children restore their majestic 1913 Mission Revival mansion; he's elated when he realizes he can restore the original linoleum in the kitchen, but the homeowners may not be open to the idea.

programme.title: Restored
programme.desc: Brett is called upon to restore a historically significant 1906 Arts and Crafts home; he brings it back to its original glory by reintroducing the closed-in fireplaces, reinstating the floor plan and replacing the 1980s kitchen.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston
programme.desc: The Cordrays transform a 1922 filling station into a hot dog business for the island; honoring the building's past as a gas and tire station, as well as Michael's late father; they bring their signature design style to their first restaurant.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Dennis and Melanie hunt for a lake house that can serve as both their home and workspace; Melanie is looking for a space that can accommodate her dance business, while Dennis wants the perfect man cave.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Jordan and Aurelio search for a home that can accommodate their growing family in the future; they have a few big-ticket items on their wish list, including a gourmet kitchen, home office, dedicated children's room and a gym.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Chantal and Keith's dream is to own a lakefront house, but their picky nature has stopped them from settling for anything less than perfect; overall, they have seen 300 properties but have yet to find the one.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Glen and Sherry have recently become empty nesters and are looking forward to this new stage of life; they are looking to make a permanent move to a lakefront property with space for guests and possible income potential.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Deb and Wolfe were friends many years ago, and after reuniting 40 years later, they fall in love and get married; the couple is looking for a lakefront home where they can enjoy time with their blended family and have space for Deb's fashion career.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Joey and Tatiana are boat captains looking for the perfect lakefront property to entertain friends; the first property is situated on an island with a modern and open-concept design; the next is situated on a peninsula with views of the lake.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Chantal and Keith's dream is to own a lakefront house, but their picky nature has stopped them from settling for anything less than perfect; overall, they have seen 300 properties but have yet to find the one.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Glen and Sherry have recently become empty nesters and are looking forward to this new stage of life; they are looking to make a permanent move to a lakefront property with space for guests and possible income potential.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Deb and Wolfe were friends many years ago, and after reuniting 40 years later, they fall in love and get married; the couple is looking for a lakefront home where they can enjoy time with their blended family and have space for Deb's fashion career.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Joey and Tatiana are boat captains looking for the perfect lakefront property to entertain friends; the first property is situated on an island with a modern and open-concept design; the next is situated on a peninsula with views of the lake.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Chantal and Keith's dream is to own a lakefront house, but their picky nature has stopped them from settling for anything less than perfect; overall, they have seen 300 properties but have yet to find the one.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Glen and Sherry have recently become empty nesters and are looking forward to this new stage of life; they are looking to make a permanent move to a lakefront property with space for guests and possible income potential.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Deb and Wolfe were friends many years ago, and after reuniting 40 years later, they fall in love and get married; the couple is looking for a lakefront home where they can enjoy time with their blended family and have space for Deb's fashion career.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Joey and Tatiana are boat captains looking for the perfect lakefront property to entertain friends; the first property is situated on an island with a modern and open-concept design; the next is situated on a peninsula with views of the lake.

programme.title: Fixer Upper
programme.sub-title: Second Chance at a Country Home
programme.desc: Jordan and Rachel dream of moving to the country with their three children, and enlist the help of Chip and Joanna after their contract falls through on another property in hopes of a second chance at country living.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Fixer Upper
programme.desc: Jenny and Ramil are moving to Waco, Texas, from California to be closer to Ramil's mother; they are looking for something that needs work despite initial concerns.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Fixer Upper
programme.desc: A California couple looks for a three-bedroom, two-bathroom house with an open floor plan and big yard for their family in sleepy Crawford, Texas.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Fixer Upper
programme.desc: NFL players reach out to Chip and Joanna to help renovate the home for a veteran to make it more accessible for him.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Fixer Upper
programme.desc: Chip and Joanna's longtime friend Brett has a dream of living on a houseboat on Lake Waco, but his tight budget and space create plenty of design challenges.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Fixer Upper
programme.desc: Empty nesters Kelvin and Culetta want a home for their children and grandchildren, and get help from their professional football player son.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Storied Spaces
programme.desc: Storytellers share how they found and transformed a beachside cottage in New York, a rundown 1960s motel in Massachusetts and a former Jewish synagogue in South Carolina.

programme.title: Storied Spaces
programme.desc: Storytellers reveal how they found and transformed an old, abandoned bank in Detroit, a seaside cottage on Cape Cod and a medieval-themed lodge in San Luis Obispo, California.

programme.title: Storied Spaces
programme.desc: Storytellers share how they found and repurposed a beach cottage on Nantucket Island, a formerly dilapidated motor lodge in downtown Raleigh, North Carolina, and a 1907 hospital in Washington, North Carolina.

programme.title: Storied Spaces
programme.desc: Owners share the stories of a historic Tudor in Grove Hill, Mich., with a fresh take on its history, a peaceful beachfront build rooted in community in Fire Island, N.Y., and an open concept home inspired by the nature in Twentynine Palms, Calif.

programme.title: Back to the Frontier
programme.desc: As the families struggle with the frontier's gender roles, the Lopers and Hanna-Riggs learn what 1880s life would have been like for their families.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Storied Spaces
programme.desc: Storytellers share how they found and transformed a beachside cottage in New York, a rundown 1960s motel in Massachusetts and a former Jewish synagogue in South Carolina.

programme.title: Storied Spaces
programme.desc: Storytellers reveal how they found and transformed an old, abandoned bank in Detroit, a seaside cottage on Cape Cod and a medieval-themed lodge in San Luis Obispo, California.

programme.title: Storied Spaces
programme.desc: Storytellers share how they found and repurposed a beach cottage on Nantucket Island, a formerly dilapidated motor lodge in downtown Raleigh, North Carolina, and a 1907 hospital in Washington, North Carolina.

programme.title: Storied Spaces
programme.desc: Owners share the stories of a historic Tudor in Grove Hill, Mich., with a fresh take on its history, a peaceful beachfront build rooted in community in Fire Island, N.Y., and an open concept home inspired by the nature in Twentynine Palms, Calif.
